text:
Bapt <baptiste.daroussin@gmail.com> writes:
> Here is a set of patches from a project I launch in order to improve
> zsh completion on freebsd.

Could you please send me either a) a tarball with the modified files in
their entirety or b) a patch against the port itself?

DES
